chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Civil Revision Application No.03 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution 16.03.2026 None present -------------------------------- This revision arises out of a summary suit dismissing the defendants / applicants’ leave to defend application. None have appeared on behalf of the applicant. On 06.02.2024 same was the case and the stay granted on the earlier date was also withdrawn. Subsequently, once again none have appeared on behalf of the applicant today. No intimation is received. It appears that the applicant has lost interest in pursuing this revision which is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Asif
